name: Ksw
description_short: KSW Federal Credit Union is a member-owned, not-for-profit financial institution serving Belfast and Waterville, Maine with NCUA insurance protection and a range of deposit and loan products.
description_long:
KSW Federal Credit Union is a community-based credit union operating two branch locations in Maine—one in Belfast at 135 Waldo Avenue and one in Waterville at 222 College Avenue. The institution has been serving its membership for at least 72 years, as evidenced by their recent annual meeting milestone. As a federal credit union, KSW is member-owned and not-for-profit, with deposits federally insured by the National Credit Union Administration (NCUA) up to standard limits. The credit union emphasizes personalized service with the tagline "Everything we do, we do for you."

KSW offers a comprehensive suite of financial products and services including deposit accounts (Kasasa checking and savings products), secured credit cards, auto financing with local inventory browsing, loan products, and digital banking through their "KSW On The Go" mobile platform. They provide both lobby and drive-thru service at competitive hours, with drive-thru access from 8:00 AM to 4:30 PM weekdays. The institution maintains fraud protection services, including separate hotlines for lost or stolen debit and credit cards, and offers online loan payment capabilities for member convenience.

KSW distinguishes itself through its deep local roots in the Kennebec Valley region of Maine, serving both Belfast and Waterville communities with personalized member service. The credit union actively engages its membership through annual meetings with member participation, board elections, and community events. Their focus on Kasasa financial products suggests an emphasis on technology-enabled banking with competitive rates. The institution maintains professional communication standards, pledging next-business-day responses to member inquiries.

As a smaller regional credit union, KSW is best suited for Maine residents and members of their field of membership seeking community-focused banking with NCUA protection. The main limitation is geographic reach—physical branches exist only in two Maine towns, though their digital platform may partially offset this constraint. Members should verify current membership eligibility requirements and product specifics directly, as detailed terms and APRs are not published on their public website.
services: Auto financing with local inventory browsing
Digital banking via "KSW On The Go" mobile platform
Share accounts (standard credit union deposit accounts)
pros: NCUA federal insurance protection on deposits, providing same level of protection as FDIC-insured banks
Two convenient branch locations in Belfast and Waterville with extended drive-thru hours (8 AM-4:30 PM weekdays)
Member-owned, not-for-profit structure means profits benefit members rather than external shareholders
Digital banking platform "KSW On The Go" for secure remote account access and transactions
Kasasa checking and savings products offering competitive rates and fee-free options
Dedicated fraud protection with separate 24/7 hotlines for lost/stolen debit (800-472-3272) and credit cards (800-991-4964)
Active member engagement through annual meetings with board elections and community participation
cons: Limited geographic footprint—only two branch locations serving Belfast and Waterville; no multi-state presence
No detailed product information, terms, rates, or APRs published on public website; requires direct contact with branches
Limited online presence with minimal product descriptions; difficult to compare offerings without visiting branch or calling
No mention of extended hours, weekend services, or online account opening capabilities
Unclear membership eligibility requirements and field of membership parameters not disclosed publicly
best_for: Maine residents in the Kennebec Valley region (Belfast and Waterville area) seeking community-focused banking
Members seeking NCUA-insured deposit accounts as a safe alternative to for-profit banks
Individuals interested in member-owned credit union governance and annual meeting participation
Local borrowers seeking auto financing or personal loans with relationship-based underwriting
diagnosis: KSW Federal Credit Union is best for Maine residents in the Belfast and Waterville area seeking community-focused, member-owned banking with NCUA protection. The primary caveat is geographic limitation—this credit union serves only two specific Maine towns, making it unsuitable for those outside this region or requiring multi-state branch access.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Ksw — Credit Union in WATERVILLE, ME | CreditDoc
meta_description: Ksw — NCUA-insured credit union in WATERVILLE, ME. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
